positive: Minimalist celestial forest scene, highly stylized for apparel print. Features silhouetted, oversized bioluminescent flora and fauna against a deep indigo night sky. The main subject is a cluster of graceful, stylized glowing mushrooms and intertwining branches forming a crescent moon arc. Lighting is dramatic, emanating solely from the flora, creating high contrast against the dark background. Color palette is restricted to sapphire blue, ethereal turquoise, deep violet, and stark black. The composition must be centered and perfectly circular/square for print reproduction, with crisp lines and a clean, graphic silhouette aesthetic. Highly detailed, clean linework, vector art style, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifact, text, signature, watermark, logo, human, face, weird anatomy, low contrast, messy, cluttered, grayscale, realistic, photographic
